required_contains.text: Take increases are paced by a block-based cooldown, but decreases are not. The rate-limit reference
documents 216,000 blocks (roughly 30 days) as the delegate-take cooldown, stored on chain as
`TxDelegateTakeRateLimit`. That cooldown applies to the `increase_take` path, while `decrease_take`
takes effect immediately, so a validator can lower commission at any time but must wait out the
